title: Amtech I9456 Bicycle Pump, Cycle Pump with Dual Adapter Head, Universal Bike Pump includes Sports Ball Inflator
features: LONG HOSE: This performance cycle pump has a 32mm (1.25") diameter steel barrel with a long 750mm (30") silicone hose for easy access
VERSATILE: With a dual adaptor head (Presta & Schrader) and an easy-to-read gauge (psi, bar and kPa), this bike pump includes a sports ball inflator plus small and large air inflators
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
WIDE APPLICATION: Useful for a range of repair, assembly, and maintenance jobs
description: Product Description Avoid deflated tyres when you need to be on the move with this Amtech performance cycle pump. This lightweight pump can be easily carried in a bag or luggage case and with the dual adaptor head and accompanying air inflators, it simply gives you the flexibility you need whether you are on the road, in the park or on holiday. Also features a clear gauge and ergonomic handle for ease when in use. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Please do not direct me to Vendor Central. I have tried many times and it’s not working.
